stories.title: Fix XSS in admin severityBadge and statusPill
stories.description: Wrap raw string parameters in escapeHtml() in src/worker/admin/campaigns.ts severityBadge() and statusPill() functions. Import escapeHtml from ../lib/escape-html. GitHub issue #381.
acceptance_criteria: severityBadge() wraps s parameter with escapeHtml()
statusPill() wraps s parameter with escapeHtml()
New test: badge with <script> tag renders escaped HTML

unit: severityBadge escapes HTML entities in severity string
statusPill escapes HTML entities in status string

stories.title: Add rate limit configs for unprotected POST routes
stories.description: Add route configs to ROUTE_RATE_LIMITS in src/worker/lib/rate-limiter.ts for: check, check-image, check-qr, quiz-check, reports-vote, digest-subscribe, newsletter-subscribe, translation-report. GitHub issue #382 (part 1 of 2).
acceptance_criteria: ROUTE_RATE_LIMITS has entries for all 8 new routes
New tests verify getRouteRateLimit returns config for each new route

unit: getRouteRateLimit returns config for check route
getRouteRateLimit returns test limits for check in test env

stories.title: Wire rate limiting into check, check-image, check-qr, quiz routes
stories.description: Wire getRouteRateLimit + createRateLimiter into 4 POST handlers: openapi-check.ts, openapi-check-image.ts, openapi-check-qr.ts, openapi-quiz.ts. Follow EXACT pattern from feed.ts lines 33-39: import {createRateLimiter, applyRateLimitHeaders, getRouteRateLimit, ROUTE_RATE_LIMITS}, get IP, call getRouteRateLimit(routeName, c.env) ?? ROUTE_RATE_LIMITS[routeName], createRateLimiter(c.env.CACHE)(ip, limits.limit, limits.windowSeconds), applyRateLimitHeaders, check .allowed. GitHub #382.
acceptance_criteria: 4 route handlers import and call createRateLimiter + getRouteRateLimit

stories.title: Wire rate limiting into reports, digest, newsletter, translation-report routes
stories.description: Wire getRouteRateLimit + createRateLimiter into 4 POST handlers: openapi-reports.ts (vote endpoint), openapi-digest.ts (subscribe), openapi-newsletter.ts (subscribe), openapi-translation-report.ts. Follow EXACT pattern from feed.ts lines 33-39. GitHub #382.
acceptance_criteria: 4 route handlers import and call createRateLimiter + getRouteRateLimit

stories.title: Sanitize campaign content before AI.run() prompt
stories.description: Add input sanitization in src/worker/lib/draft-generator.ts before passing campaign data to env.AI.run(). Strip control characters, limit content length, escape prompt-injection sequences. GitHub issue #383.
acceptance_criteria: Campaign content sanitized before prompt construction
Test: prompt injection payload is neutralized

unit: draft generator sanitizes campaign text before AI.run()

stories.title: Add tests for openapi-admin, openapi-webhooks, openapi-reports
stories.description: Create test files for 3 highest-priority untested route files: openapi-admin.ts (489 LOC), openapi-webhooks.ts (248 LOC), openapi-reports.ts. GitHub issue #384 (batch 1).

stories.title: Add tests for remaining 8 untested route files
stories.description: Create test files for: openapi-digest.ts, openapi-metrics.ts, openapi-newsletter.ts, openapi-quiz.ts, openapi-check-qr.ts, openapi-check-image.ts, openapi-share.ts, registry.ts. GitHub issue #384 (batch 2).
acceptance_criteria: 8 new test files created with >=2 tests each

stories.title: Pass CSP nonce to all admin layout calls
stories.description: Add c.get('cspNonce') to all adminLayout() calls in campaigns.ts (5), drafts.ts (2), newsletter.ts (3), translation-reports.ts (1), translations.ts (1). GitHub issue #385.
acceptance_criteria: All 12 adminLayout() calls pass nonce parameter

unit: admin campaign page includes nonce in script tags

stories.title: Add tests for fetch handler hostname routing
stories.description: Test index.ts fetch handler: CDN/admin/main host routing, pathname rewriting, case normalization. GitHub issue #386. HOTSPOT: src/worker/index.ts — change_freq: 1.0, bug_corr: 0.43.
acceptance_criteria: Tests for CDN, admin, main host routing
Hotspot file src/worker/index.ts regression risk assessed

unit: fetch routes cdn host to CDN app
fetch routes admin host to admin app

stories.title: Add tests for middleware chain.ts
stories.description: Test applyMiddleware(): request ID, logging, error handler (HTML/JSON), CSP routing. GitHub issue #387.
acceptance_criteria: Error handler tested for HTML and JSON

unit: error handler returns HTML for text/html
error handler returns JSON for application/json

stories.title: Add data-testid and ARIA to UI components
stories.description: Add data-testid to remaining 33% of interactive elements. Add aria-label/role to Quiz options, ReportForm inputs, Checker file upload. GitHub issue #388.

wcag: Quiz options have appropriate ARIA roles

stories.title: Fix npm audit vulnerabilities
stories.description: npm audit fix to update hono and wrangler/undici. Verify no breaking changes. Commit package-lock.json. GitHub issue #391.

stories.title: Deploy BUTTONDOWN_API_KEY to Workers
stories.description: Retrieve from Infisical, bind via wrangler secret put to production and preview. GitHub issue #358.
acceptance_criteria: Key bound to production and preview Workers

stories.title: Move Zero Trust config to Pulumi config
stories.description: Extract hardcoded email domains and group UUIDs from infra/index.ts into Pulumi config. GitHub issue #389.
acceptance_criteria: pulumi preview shows no resource changes

stories.title: Add freshness timestamps to campaign data
stories.description: Add last_updated ISO8601 to each campaign in src/worker/data/campaigns.ts. Log warning for >90 day stale. GitHub issue #390.
